hooks.command: bash -c "CMD='$TOOL_INPUT'; if echo \"$CMD\" | grep -qiE '\bgit\s+commit\b|\bgit\s+push\b|\bgh\s+pr\s+create\b|\bgit\s+checkout\s+-b\b|\bgit\s+branch\s+-[dD]\b|\bgit\s+reset\s+--hard\b|\bgit\s+push\s+--force\b|\bgit\s+push\s+-f\b'; then echo 'DENY: Git write operations are blocked by agent system. Output the commands for the user to run manually.' && exit 1; fi"
